changes.task: Create Budget ent schema with monthly tracking
changes.description: Created Budget entity with month (YYYY-MM), amount_cents, and rollover fields. Unique index on (household, category, month). BudgetService.GetBudgetProgress calculates spent amounts by summing expense entries per category per month. 3 tests: progress with expenses, no expenses, invalid month format.

changes.task: Create Tag ent schema with transaction tagging
changes.description: Created Tag entity with name, optional color, household scope, and unique index on (household, name). Many-to-many relationship with Transaction via Tag.To('transactions') and Transaction.From('tags').

changes.task: Create RecurringBill ent schema with status tracking
changes.description: Created RecurringBill entity with name, amount_cents, due_day (1-31), frequency enum (monthly/weekly/annual), and status enum (pending/paid/overdue). BillService.UpdateBillStatuses auto-marks pending bills as overdue when past due day.
